# <Change title>

## Why

Describe the user-visible problem or operational pressure. Prefer concrete
behavior over project history.

## What changed

State the new contract or behavior. Include compatibility and validation rules
that callers need to know.

```text
<small request, response, or command example>
```

## Proof

List the tests or observations that demonstrate the change works at the public
boundary. Include the environment when it matters, such as real PostgreSQL or
a containerized API.

## Remaining operational note

Record only known limitations, rollout needs, cleanup tasks, or follow-up work.
Write `None` when there are no remaining concerns.
